PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-05-2021 Continued To Apr-19-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Dennis Vann, appearing via ZOOM, counsel for Franza Gifffen, petitioner, also appearing via ZOOM.

The court advises Mr. Vann of the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes specifically with regard to the missing telephone number on the Duties and Liabilities currently on file with the court. Mr. Vann advises the court that the missing phone number was a clerical oversight and advises the court that an amended Duties and Liabilities, to include phone number, will be filed soon. Status for the filing of amended Duties and Liabilities is set for APR-19-2021.

The court asks if anyone opposes the court granting the petition for Successor Administrator - no objections are made. The matter was taken under submission with the intent to grant the petition subject to the filing of the amended Duties and Liabilities. Bond is set at $220,000.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Robert Woods; Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jan-06-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Petition for Letters of Administration is off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: S. Park. Not reported.
